title: AI Climate Adaptation for Underserved Communities
eligibility: Open to universities and minority-serving institutions.
program_description: Projects use machine learning and predictive modeling for climate resilience with stakeholder co-design and policy impact.

title: Clinical Data Infrastructure Pilot
program_description: Pilot experiment develops biomedical analytics infrastructure and validation protocols for patient outcomes.

title: K-12 STEM Workforce Pathways
program_description: Education program for K-12 youth with curriculum evaluation, training, and broadening participation activities.

title: Postdoctoral Convergence Research Network
program_description: Builds interdisciplinary convergence network for graduate and postdoctoral researchers with shared infrastructure.

title: Public Health Innovation Translation Hub
program_description: Supports public health innovation, implementation, and technology transfer for community members.

title: Undergraduate Data Science Training Center
program_description: Center develops undergraduate training in data science and analytics with assessment methods.

title: Community Environmental Monitoring Program
program_description: Participatory environmental monitoring with community stakeholders and sustainability metrics.

title: AI-Enabled Clinical Simulation Testbed
program_description: Uses deep learning and simulation for clinical decision support with prototype validation.

title: Equity-Focused Higher Education Success Initiative
program_description: Mixed methods assessment of undergraduate outcomes to improve inclusion and diversity in STEM.

title: Policy Implementation for Climate and Health
program_description: Evidence-based policy implementation research on climate and public health impacts.
